Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I gathered you all here because I wanted to let you know how my research has been going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It concerns the Shadows that have been appearing during full moons.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Now, I want you to listen closely. It might be hard to follow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 22 0 222 25 25 20}Shadows can be divided into twelve categories, according to their characteristics.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}This, we've known for a while. We can think of it like their class or order.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 22 0 222 33 25 20}I've classified the special Shadows we've seen so far and, well, it's simply fascinating![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Wh-Why're you so excited about it...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Those four Shadows belonged to Categories I through IV, in order of their appearance![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}They may have looked different than the more common ones, but the classification scheme still applies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}And that's something we should be excited about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, I get it. There are twelve in all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}And eight we haven't seen yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}That's exactly right, Yamagishi-kun! You're quite sharp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Oh, uh, okay. But, what are they after?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}That's a good question, and that's what we haven't figured out yet: their motive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}They don't kill their prey; they feed on their minds.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Now, it could be considered predation, but is it really? Is there actually an underlying intent behind their behavior?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 22 0 222 34 25 37}The purpose of the Shadows as a whole... That's what we need to consider.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}But no matter what their intent, we still have to beat the rest of 'em.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}That's about all we can do at this point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}According to the data, each one has been stronger than the last. That means we better start training harder.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}We'll manage. We've got plenty of time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}But why does Tartarus even exist in the first place...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The puzzle pieces are falling[n]into place, one by one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Those large Shadows that only[n]appear on the full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what their purpose is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Eight more remain...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We have a long road ahead of us.[n]{f 1 1}
